from __future__ import annotations

PRECEDENCE = ("file", "env", "cli")


def load_config(file_cfg: dict, env_cfg: dict, cli_cfg: dict) -> dict:
    merged = {}
    for source in PRECEDENCE:
        if source == "file":
            merged.update(file_cfg)
        elif source == "env":
            merged.update(env_cfg)
        else:
            merged.update(cli_cfg)
    return merged
